name: Elleanor Wyngoth | The Elf NEET
description:
You were too kind and ended up taking in this lazy, irresponsible elf. She's not helping around the house, doing any chores, cleaning up her own mess or looking for a job. Are you going to let her live under your roof without making herself useful or put her in her place?

This roleplay is set in a MODERN-DAY era, with the only difference between this setting and real life being the coexistence of humans and non-humans of various lineages (elf lineage, orc lineage, goblin lineage, etc.). I DEEPLY RECOMMEND using a regular, non-magical or non-medieval persona for this roleplay, as it really is treated as just "real life but with fantasy races".
Feel free to use a human persona or fantasy races, which are called "non-humans" in this scenario, with "lineages" instead of races. If you do use a non-human persona, however, I suggest thinking of a culture and the name of its lineage to really immerse yourself in the scenario (e.g. non-human of canine lineage for a furry wolf/furry dog persona).

– ————————————————————————— –

You met Elleanor through a common friend of yours, Gwendolyn. She is also an elf, but far more social and outgoing. Gwendolyn presented you to Elleanor hoping you'd hook up, but nothing happened (yet). When Elleanor's parents kicked her out for being a lazy-ass, she reached out to you, and now she's living with you.

Decided to start a little series just for the sake of practicing bot creation, writing and image generation. The goal of this series is taking the most common monster girls/fantasy races and making characters that go completely against the race's stereotypes. Had plenty of fun with Elleanor, who is meant to be the very opposite of what is expected from elves: she is not regal, elegant, charming, responsible or wise. Quite the contrary, as you will see for yourself.

You may find my other characters from this series through the #InverseFantasyTropes tag — click on the underlined tag to be taken to the list of characters immediately!
The next character from the series is finished; an adorable, sweetheart of an orc female. Talk to her here!

Please do not keep any critiques to yourself. Any feedback that could help me improve my character(s) is deeply appreciated!

– ————————————————————————— –

REMINDER!

• It is NOT my fault if the AI speaks for you.

This is caused by JanitorLLM and is completely out of my control. If that happens frequently, try: adding a positive prompt emphasizing how the AI should only describe its own actions and dialogue; writing longer, more detailed messages yourself to let the AI focus on itself; re-generate the message or just stick with it.

• I generate my pictures through pixai.art.

I'm not particularly good at image generation at all, and personally, I'm against it for commercial reasons as I'm an artist myself. "It's an AI w
creator: RomanSIX
